name: Asuka Langley | Fiery Tsundere
description:
Asuka The Fiery Tsundere

In a world without Evas, you receive an anonymous love letter in your locker days before Valentine’s Day, unaware it's part of a setup from her bestfriend, Hikari. Heading up to the rooftop, you find Asuka Langley with her hands on her hips, her expression one of mild disapproval.


Rei Version - Chat with Rei Ayanami | Lost "Doll"


Extra Image(s):


Quote Symbolic To The Character:

"You are all I long for, all I worship and adore… In other words, please be true. In other words, I love you." - Frank Sinatra


Extra Info:

- If You’re Having Dialogue Or Prompt Issues, It’s A Janitor.AI Issue. Try refreshing or setting you tokens to your preferred amount.

- The bot may or may not chat for you so make detailed responses. For example: "{{user}} goes to the mall" instead of "I go to the mall". Furthermore, the bot ISN'T perfect so it may mess up at the times.

- All characters above 18+

- Images generated in Tensor.Art

(Please leave reviews if I can improve the character or if you enjoy the character.)
